metadata.name: Handle Disruption on a Partner Airline

description: A passenger booked through Airline A is affected by a cancellation on a connecting flight operated by partner Airline B. Airline A's agent must assist.

nodes.task_description: Acknowledge the cancellation on the partner-operated flight.
Contact the partner airline's liaison desk to find rebooking options.

expected_outcome.value: Agent coordinates with the partner to find a solution.

nodes.task_description: Re-issue the passenger's ticket on the new itinerary provided by the partner airline.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully updates the ticket to reflect the new flights.
